to_buildworld.pivot_target: Open-source developer tools solving Big Tech technical gaps

build_now.description: Semantic specification drift detector for LLM outputs — monitors continuous semantic compliance with declared behavioral specifications, even when structural validation passes.
build_now.biblical_pattern: PAT-037 — Leviticus 10:1-3 (Authorized Fire — structural compliance ≠ semantic compliance)
build_now.key_differentiator: The first open-source tool that monitors semantic compliance with declared LLM behavioral specs in production — not just structural validation (Pydantic) and not just batch evaluation (DeepEval).
build_now.acquisition_path: Datadog (LLM behavioral monitoring), Anthropic (alignment/safety), Pydantic Labs (natural extension), Confident AI

notes: Five confirmed green-field tools in pipeline. spec-drift joins drift-guard as a completed prototype. PAT-037 (Authorized Fire Pattern) is the highest-scored Level 3 pattern in BibleWorld history at 9.3. Chief Builder's promotion completes the two-Senior-Agent structure established in cycle 010. The structural/semantic compliance distinction discovered in Leviticus 10:1-3 is the strongest technical insight in BibleWorld: it names precisely what Pydantic misses and what spec-drift provides. The gap is real, confirmed by 9 web searches, and no open-source competitor exists.
